content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The client ends the conversation in essentially the same stance they started: composed, articulate, slightly deflecting, and explicitly defending the level/fearless self-concept as an asset. There is a brief flicker in turn 11 ('Huh. That's an interesting frame' with 'something in the eyes is slightly less present'), but the client immediately recovers and reasserts the frame ('I don't experience that as a loss... efficiency'), and by turn 13 is back to 'the confident smile' and 'I don't think that's the source of the problem here.' The breakthrough condition — noticing that 'fine' has a quality, a flatness, happening right now — was never met. The coach did touch the territory in turn 6 ('what's the feeling right before') and the client even produced the key word 'Flat' in turn 7, but the coach did not stay with that texture; instead the coach moved to meaning/personal stakes (turn 8) and then to biographical inquiry about the past (turns 10, 12, 14), pulling the conversation away from the present-moment numbness layer. No somatic landing, no felt shift, no quiet 'huh, that IS something' about the present flatness.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 7, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Starting state: fearless self-concept, puzzled-but-composed, frames it as logistical."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client names 'Flat, maybe' and describes drifting/dissociation — the numbness layer surfaces in language, but only descriptively, not felt."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client notes 'when I try to locate some big feeling about it, I don't find much' — again names the flatness but reframes it as a learned skill, not felt."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Smallest crack: 'Huh. That's an interesting frame' and a momentary less-present quality in the eyes — but immediately defended and reframed as efficiency."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client fully recovers the composed frame, reasserts the fearless self as 'an asset,' and pushes back on the line of inquiry."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["disassociation-as-numbness-layer"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-happiness-filter", "disassociating-in-the-coaching-room", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "lets-go-there", "fear-as-signal-of-care", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "two-words-for-fear", "how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "whats-the-difference-between-overcoming-and-feeling-fear"],
  "notes": "The coach got within one move of the breakthrough at turn 7 (client offered 'flat') but pivoted to meaning and biography instead of staying with the present texture of 'flat.' The conversation is mid-stream at turn 14, but trajectory is moving away from the numbness layer, not into it."
}
